name: Enterprise Architect
description: Primary user: models and manages enterprise architecture across TOGAF domains

name: CTO / CIO
description: Executive sponsor: strategic technology decisions and architecture governance

name: Compliance Officer
description: Ensures regulatory and policy compliance across the architecture

name: Development Team
description: Builds and maintains the TheArchitect platform

name: Digital Transformation Pressure
description: Organizations need structured transformation planning to stay competitive

name: Architecture Complexity
description: Growing IT landscapes require visual and layered architecture management

name: Regulatory Compliance Need
description: Legal and industry mandates require formal architecture governance

name: Current Tooling Fragmented
description: Existing EA tools lack 3D visualization, AI analytics, and multi-agent simulation

name: Manual Analysis Error-Prone
description: Manual architecture reviews miss cross-layer dependencies and risk cascades

name: Unified EA Platform
description: Single platform for all enterprise architecture management needs

name: TOGAF 10 Compliance
description: Full alignment with TOGAF 10 ADM and ArchiMate 3.2 specification

name: AI-Augmented Decisions
description: AI-powered risk analysis, impact assessment, and roadmap recommendations

name: Real-time Collaboration
description: Multiple architects working simultaneously on shared architecture models

name: Reduced Architecture Review Time
description: Faster reviews through 3D visualization and AI-powered advisor insights

name: Better Risk Visibility
description: Proactive risk detection via Bayesian cascade and K-S drift analysis

name: Faster Transformation Planning
description: Automated roadmap generation with Monte Carlo cost simulation

name: Single Source of Truth
description: One authoritative architecture repository per organization

name: ArchiMate 3.2 Standard
description: All elements and relationships follow the ArchiMate 3.2 specification

name: Automation First
description: Automate analysis, risk scoring, and recommendations wherever possible

name: 3D Visualization Requirement
description: Architecture must be viewable as interactive 3D model with layer planes

name: Multi-Agent Simulation Requirement
description: Stakeholder perspectives must be simulatable via multi-agent debate

name: RBAC Authorization
description: Role-based access control for all operations and data

name: Audit Trail Requirement
description: All changes must be logged with user, IP, timestamp, and risk level

name: Import Interoperability
description: Must import from BPMN 2.0, n8n workflows, CSV, and ArchiMate exchange

name: Browser-Based Delivery
description: Must run in modern browsers without desktop installation

name: Self-Hosted Option
description: Must support on-premise Docker deployment on customer infrastructure

name: Enterprise Architecture Management
description: Core capability: manage enterprise architecture lifecycle across TOGAF domains

name: 3D Visualization & Navigation
description: Capability: immersive 3D architecture visualization with layer planes and fly-to navigation

name: AI-Powered Analytics
description: Capability: AI-driven risk analysis, impact assessment, predictive analytics, and roadmap generation

name: Governance & Compliance
description: Capability: policy management, approval workflows, compliance dashboards, and audit trails

name: Multi-Stakeholder Simulation
description: Capability: MiroFish multi-agent debate simulation with custom personas and scenario comparison

name: Template Marketplace
description: Capability: community-driven architecture template sharing and deployment

name: Architecture Lifecycle Management
description: Value stream: from current-state capture through gap analysis to target-state realization

name: Digital Transformation Planning
description: Value stream: strategic planning with Monte Carlo simulation and transformation roadmaps

name: Architecture Team Resources
description: Skilled architects, AI compute budget, and cloud infrastructure resources

name: Adopt AI-First Architecture
description: Strategic decision to integrate AI across all EA analysis and recommendation workflows

name: Enterprise Architect (Actor)
description: Person who creates and manages architecture models in the platform

name: Solution Architect (Actor)
description: Person who designs application-level solutions within the architecture

name: Project Owner (Role)
description: Role: full control over project elements, settings, and team membership

name: Viewer (Role)
description: Role: read-only access to architecture views and reports

name: Editor (Role)
description: Role: can create and modify elements but not manage project settings

name: Import Architecture Data
description: Process: import architecture elements from BPMN, n8n workflows, CSV, or manual entry

name: Run MiroFish Simulation
description: Process: configure agents, run multi-round debate, collect validated actions per element

name: Generate Transformation Roadmap
description: Process: 3-layer cost model analysis with Beta-PERT Monte Carlo and wave-based roadmap

name: Execute Advisor Scan
description: Process: AI Architecture Advisor scans elements for health scoring and proactive insights

name: Export PDF Report
description: Process: generate PDF reports with architecture snapshots and analysis results

name: Manage Users & Roles
description: Process: user registration, role assignment, MFA setup, and session management

name: Configure Project Settings
description: Process: project creation, team membership, preferences, and workspace configuration

name: Architecture Visualization Service
description: Service: renders 3D architecture views with layer planes, element meshes, and connection beams

name: Stakeholder Simulation Service
description: Service: orchestrates MiroFish multi-agent simulation rounds with SSE live feed

name: Compliance Assessment Service
description: Service: evaluates architecture compliance against configurable policy rules

name: Risk Analysis Service
description: Service: calculates risk scores using Bayesian cascade and Kolmogorov-Smirnov drift detection

name: Architecture Changed
description: Event: triggered when architecture elements are added, modified, or removed

name: Simulation Completed
description: Event: triggered when MiroFish simulation run finishes all debate rounds

name: Architecture Model
description: Object: the complete architecture model of an organization across all TOGAF layers

name: Compliance Report
description: Object: compliance assessment output with violations, recommendations, and scores

name: ArchitectureElement
description: Entity: core architecture element with type, layer, position3D, risk, maturity, and metadata

name: Connection
description: Entity: relationship between elements with type (ArchiMate 3.2) and optional label

name: Project
description: Entity: project container with name, description, team membership, and settings

name: User
description: Entity: user account with credentials, roles, preferences, OAuth links, and MFA config

name: SimulationRun
description: Entity: MiroFish run with config, rounds, agent turns, validated actions, and consensus result

name: CustomPersona
description: Entity: user-defined simulation agent persona with traits, focus areas, and visible layers

name: Workspace
description: Entity: workspace grouping imported elements by source (BPMN, n8n, CSV) with offset positioning

name: AuditLog
description: Entity: immutable audit trail entry with action, user, IP, timestamp, and risk level

name: ArchitectureSnapshot
description: Entity: point-in-time snapshot of architecture state for scenario comparison

name: AdvisorInsight
description: Entity: AI-generated insight with category, severity, affected elements, and recommendation

name: RoadmapWave
description: Entity: transformation wave with elements, cost estimates, timeline, and dependencies

name: Neo4j Graph Model
description: Model: graph database schema for elements (nodes) and connections (relationships) with properties

name: MongoDB Document Model
description: Model: document schemas for users, projects, simulations, personas, audit logs, and settings

name: Redis Cache Model
description: Model: session storage pattern with key format session:{userId}:{sessionId} and TTL

name: TheArchitect Frontend
description: Application: React 18 SPA with Three.js 3D visualization, Zustand state, and Tailwind CSS

name: TheArchitect Backend
description: Application: Express.js API server with Passport.js auth, Socket.IO realtime, and multi-DB

name: MiroFish Engine
description: Component: multi-agent simulation engine with configurable personas and round-based debate

name: AI Architecture Advisor
description: Component: proactive health scoring with pattern detection and insight generation

name: Stochastic Engine
description: Component: Kolmogorov axiom validation, Bayesian cascade risk, K-S drift detection, Beta-PERT Monte Carlo

name: Roadmap Generator
description: Component: 3-layer cost model with interactive TOGAF gap analysis and wave planning

name: BPMN Parser
description: Component: XML parser mapping BPMN 2.0 elements to ArchiMate architecture elements

name: n8n Parser
description: Component: JSON parser mapping n8n workflow nodes to ArchiMate elements with type inference

name: CSV Parser
description: Component: RFC 4180 CSV parser with type inference and auto-grid positioning

name: PDF Export Service
description: Component: server-side PDF generation with architecture snapshots and analysis data

name: Auth Module
description: Component: JWT access/refresh tokens, MFA via TOTP, OAuth (Google/GitHub/Microsoft)

name: Architecture CRUD Service
description: Component: Neo4j-backed CRUD for elements and connections with Zod validation

name: REST API Gateway
description: Service: Express.js REST API at /api/* with JWT auth middleware and RBAC

name: SSE Streaming Service
description: Service: Server-Sent Events for MiroFish live simulation feed

name: WebSocket Real-time Service
description: Service: Socket.IO for real-time collaboration, presence, and team chat

name: Node.js v22
description: Runtime: Node.js v22 LTS with ES modules and native fetch

name: Vite
description: Build tool: Vite 6 with React plugin, HMR, and production bundling

name: Docker
description: Container: multi-stage Docker build with Alpine base for production deployment

name: Turbo
description: Build system: Turborepo for monorepo task orchestration with dependency-aware caching

name: Linux Ubuntu 24.04
description: Operating system running on VPS and as base for Docker containers

name: MongoDB Server
description: Infrastructure: MongoDB 7 for document storage (users, projects, simulations, audit)

name: Neo4j Graph Database
description: Infrastructure: Neo4j 5 for graph storage of architecture elements and connections

name: Redis Session Store
description: Infrastructure: Redis 7 for session storage, caching, and pub/sub

name: MinIO Object Storage
description: Infrastructure: S3-compatible object storage for file uploads and architecture snapshots

name: Caddy Reverse Proxy
description: Infrastructure: Caddy 2 reverse proxy with automatic HTTPS and request routing

name: Hostinger VPS
description: Platform: Hostinger KVM 2 VPS (Ubuntu 24.04) with Docker runtime

name: GitHub Repository
description: Platform: GitHub repository for source code, CI/CD workflows, and issue tracking

name: Docker Image: TheArchitect
description: Artifact: multi-stage Docker build output deployed to production VPS

name: Docker Image: Neo4j
description: Artifact: official Neo4j 5 container image from Docker Hub

name: Internet / HTTPS
description: Network: public internet access via HTTPS with Caddy TLS termination

name: Internal Docker Network
description: Network: private Docker bridge network for inter-container communication

name: Phase 1: Core Platform
description: Work package: React 3D frontend, Express API, Neo4j/MongoDB, auth, RBAC (completed)

name: Phase 2: MiroFish Simulation
description: Work package: multi-agent debate engine with personas and scenario comparison (completed)

name: Phase 3: AI Analytics Suite
description: Work package: Stochastic Engine, AI Advisor, Roadmap Generator (completed)

name: Phase 4: Governance & Marketplace
description: Work package: compliance dashboards, approval workflows, audit trail, template marketplace (in progress)

name: Phase 5: ArchiMate 3.2 & Self-Test
description: Work package: full ArchiMate expansion, CSV import, recursive self-architecture testing

name: Current Platform State
description: Plateau: Phases 1-3 complete — core platform with simulation and AI analytics operational

name: Target Platform State
description: Plateau: full TOGAF 10 EA platform with governance, marketplace, and ArchiMate 3.2 compliance
